block.title: Scheduling PDF export:
block.text:
All fields are mandatory to be able to schedule PDF export ... take 5 minutes to do it well, you'll never regret it ;-)
 if you dont need this feature , you can ignore this step (keep fields empty and save).

block.title: Splunk User Credentials
block.text:
Splunk username and password only needed for scheduling PDF generation.
Ensure this User exists and has permission to access the dashboard you want to capture.

block.title: PhantomJS Settings
block.text:
Smart Exporter needs access to phantomJS bin folder path.

Follow this link to download and install the appropriate version depending on your OS.

block.title: PDF Output Settings
block.text: Scheduled PDF will be stored at (eg: "/tmp/smartexporter"):
